ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for splits and dividends */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the drawdown */,
  "valley_date" TEXT /* Valley date of the drawdown */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the drawdown */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown percentage */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the drawdown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis result */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward, sideways) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the trend analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used to detect the trend */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., weak, strong) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the dashboard was modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dashboard is public or private */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., drawdown, trend change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., -10%, 5%) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the alert is active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_address" TEXT /* Address to which the notification should be sent (e.g., email address, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
